mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT TOP 1 CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), SNAPSHOT_DT, 120) FROM d21_제조지시VLR_SNAPSHOT WHERE YYYYMM = #{yyyymm} AND SITE = #{site}) AS SNAPSHOT_DT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM d21_제조지시VLR_SNAPSHOT WHERE YYYYMM = #{yyyymm} AND SITE = #{site}) AS D21_SNAP_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM d22_RUN제조VLR_SNAPSHOT WHERE YYYYMM = #{yyyymm} AND SITE = #{site}) AS D22_SNAP_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM d27_내포장MST_SNAPSHOT WHERE YYYYMM = #{yyyymm} AND SITE = #{site}) AS D27_SNAP_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM d21_제조지시VLR WHERE 작업시작 BETWEEN #{yyyymm} + '01' AND REPLACE(EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},1,4), SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},5,2), 1)),'-','')) AS D21_CURR_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM d22_RUN제조VLR WHERE 작업시작 BETWEEN #{yyyymm} + '01' AND REPLACE(EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},1,4), SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},5,2), 1)),'-','')) AS D22_CURR_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM d27_내포장MST WHERE 대기작업시각 BETWEEN #{yyyymm} + '01 080000' AND FORMAT(DATEADD(MONTH, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},1,4), SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},5,2), 1)), 'yyyyMMdd') + ' 075959') AS D27_CURR_CNT

WITH SNAP AS ( SELECT 공장코드, LOT_NO, 공정코드, 순서, RUN_NO, 작업구분, 작업시작, 투입수량, 검사수량, 불량수량, 양품수량, CELL수량 FROM d21_제조지시VLR_SNAPSHOT WHERE YYYYMM = #{yyyymm} AND SITE = #{site} ), CURR AS ( SELECT 공장코드, LOT_NO, 공정코드, 순서, RUN_NO, 작업구분, 작업시작, 투입수량, 검사수량, 불량수량, 양품수량, CELL수량 FROM d21_제조지시VLR WHERE 작업시작 BETWEEN #{yyyymm} + '01' AND REPLACE(EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},1,4), SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},5,2), 1)),'-','') ) SELECT 'd21_제조지시VLR' AS SOURCE_TABLE, COALESCE(S.공장코드, C.공장코드) AS 공장코드, COALESCE(S.LOT_NO, C.LOT_NO) AS LOT_NO, COALESCE(S.공정코드, C.공정코드) AS 공정코드, COALESCE(S.순서, C.순서) AS 순서, COALESCE(S.RUN_NO, C.RUN_NO) AS RUN_NO, COALESCE(S.작업구분, C.작업구분) AS 작업구분, COALESCE(S.작업시작, C.작업시작) AS 작업시작, -- 스냅샷 수량 ISNULL(S.CELL수량, 0) AS SNAP_CELL, ISNULL(S.불량수량, 0) AS SNAP_불량, ISNULL(S.양품수량, 0) AS SNAP_양품, -- 현재 수량 ISNULL(C.CELL수량, 0) AS CURR_CELL, ISNULL(C.불량수량, 0) AS CURR_불량, ISNULL(C.양품수량, 0) AS CURR_양품, -- 차이 ISNULL(C.CELL수량, 0) - ISNULL(S.CELL수량, 0) AS DIFF_CELL, ISNULL(C.불량수량, 0) - ISNULL(S.불량수량, 0) AS DIFF_불량, ISNULL(C.양품수량, 0) - ISNULL(S.양품수량, 0) AS DIFF_양품, -- 상태 CASE WHEN S.LOT_NO IS NULL THEN '추가' WHEN C.LOT_NO IS NULL THEN '삭제' WHEN ABS(ISNULL(S.CELL수량,0) - ISNULL(C.CELL수량,0)) > 0.01 OR ABS(ISNULL(S.불량수량,0) - ISNULL(C.불량수량,0)) > 0.01 OR ABS(ISNULL(S.양품수량,0) - ISNULL(C.양품수량,0)) > 0.01 THEN '변경' ELSE '정상' END AS STATUS FROM SNAP S FULL OUTER JOIN CURR C ON S.공장코드 = C.공장코드 AND S.LOT_NO = C.LOT_NO AND S.공정코드 = C.공정코드 AND S.순서 = C.순서 ORDER BY CASE WHEN S.LOT_NO IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN C.LOT_NO IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN ABS(ISNULL(S.CELL수량,0) - ISNULL(C.CELL수량,0)) > 0.01 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, COALESCE(S.작업시작, C.작업시작), COALESCE(S.LOT_NO, C.LOT_NO)

WITH SNAP AS ( SELECT 공장코드, RUN_NO, 공정코드, 차수, LOT_NO, 작업구분, 작업시작, 투입수량, 검사수량, 불량수량, 양품수량 FROM d22_RUN제조VLR_SNAPSHOT WHERE YYYYMM = #{yyyymm} AND SITE = #{site} ), CURR AS ( SELECT 공장코드, RUN_NO, 공정코드, 차수, LOT_NO, 작업구분, 작업시작, 투입수량, 검사수량, 불량수량, 양품수량 FROM d22_RUN제조VLR WHERE 작업시작 BETWEEN #{yyyymm} + '01' AND REPLACE(EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},1,4), SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},5,2), 1)),'-','') ) SELECT 'd22_RUN제조VLR' AS SOURCE_TABLE, COALESCE(S.공장코드, C.공장코드) AS 공장코드, COALESCE(S.RUN_NO, C.RUN_NO) AS RUN_NO, COALESCE(S.공정코드, C.공정코드) AS 공정코드, COALESCE(S.차수, C.차수) AS 차수, COALESCE(S.LOT_NO, C.LOT_NO) AS LOT_NO, COALESCE(S.작업구분, C.작업구분) AS 작업구분, COALESCE(S.작업시작, C.작업시작) AS 작업시작, -- 스냅샷 수량 ISNULL(S.불량수량, 0) AS SNAP_불량, ISNULL(S.양품수량, 0) AS SNAP_양품, -- 현재 수량 ISNULL(C.불량수량, 0) AS CURR_불량, ISNULL(C.양품수량, 0) AS CURR_양품, -- 차이 ISNULL(C.불량수량, 0) - ISNULL(S.불량수량, 0) AS DIFF_불량, ISNULL(C.양품수량, 0) - ISNULL(S.양품수량, 0) AS DIFF_양품, -- 상태 CASE WHEN S.RUN_NO IS NULL THEN '추가' WHEN C.RUN_NO IS NULL THEN '삭제' WHEN ABS(ISNULL(S.불량수량,0) - ISNULL(C.불량수량,0)) > 0.01 OR ABS(ISNULL(S.양품수량,0) - ISNULL(C.양품수량,0)) > 0.01 THEN '변경' ELSE '정상' END AS STATUS FROM SNAP S FULL OUTER JOIN CURR C ON S.공장코드 = C.공장코드 AND S.RUN_NO = C.RUN_NO AND S.공정코드 = C.공정코드 AND S.차수 = C.차수 ORDER BY CASE WHEN S.RUN_NO IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN C.RUN_NO IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN ABS(ISNULL(S.불량수량,0) - ISNULL(C.불량수량,0)) > 0.01 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, COALESCE(S.작업시작, C.작업시작), COALESCE(S.RUN_NO, C.RUN_NO)

WITH SNAP AS ( SELECT PACK_QRNO, RUN_ID, 발행일자, 발행구분, 상태코드, PACK상태, Cell수량, Tray수량, 대기작업시각, 재공적용_여부 FROM d27_내포장MST_SNAPSHOT WHERE YYYYMM = #{yyyymm} AND SITE = #{site} ), CURR AS ( SELECT PACK_QRNO, RUN_ID, 발행일자, 발행구분, 상태코드, PACK상태, Cell수량, Tray수량, 대기작업시각, 재공적용_여부 FROM d27_내포장MST WHERE 대기작업시각 BETWEEN #{yyyymm} + '01 080000' AND FORMAT(DATEADD(MONTH, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},1,4), SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},5,2), 1)), 'yyyyMMdd') + ' 075959' ) SELECT 'd27_내포장MST' AS SOURCE_TABLE, COALESCE(S.PACK_QRNO, C.PACK_QRNO) AS PACK_QRNO, COALESCE(S.RUN_ID, C.RUN_ID) AS RUN_ID, COALESCE(S.발행일자, C.발행일자) AS 발행일자, COALESCE(S.발행구분, C.발행구분) AS 발행구분, COALESCE(S.대기작업시각, C.대기작업시각) AS 대기작업시각, -- 스냅샷 수량 (OUT = Cell수량) ISNULL(S.Cell수량, 0) AS SNAP_CELL, ISNULL(S.Tray수량, 0) AS SNAP_TRAY, -- 현재 수량 ISNULL(C.Cell수량, 0) AS CURR_CELL, ISNULL(C.Tray수량, 0) AS CURR_TRAY, -- 차이 ISNULL(C.Cell수량, 0) - ISNULL(S.Cell수량, 0) AS DIFF_CELL, ISNULL(C.Tray수량, 0) - ISNULL(S.Tray수량, 0) AS DIFF_TRAY, -- 상태코드 변경 비교 S.상태코드 AS SNAP_상태코드, C.상태코드 AS CURR_상태코드, S.PACK상태 AS SNAP_PACK상태, C.PACK상태 AS CURR_PACK상태, -- 상태 CASE WHEN S.PACK_QRNO IS NULL THEN '추가' WHEN C.PACK_QRNO IS NULL THEN '삭제' WHEN ABS(ISNULL(S.Cell수량,0) - ISNULL(C.Cell수량,0)) > 0.01 OR ABS(ISNULL(S.Tray수량,0) - ISNULL(C.Tray수량,0)) > 0.01 OR ISNULL(S.상태코드,'') != ISNULL(C.상태코드,'') OR ISNULL(S.PACK상태,'') != ISNULL(C.PACK상태,'') THEN '변경' ELSE '정상' END AS STATUS FROM SNAP S FULL OUTER JOIN CURR C ON S.PACK_QRNO = C.PACK_QRNO ORDER BY CASE WHEN S.PACK_QRNO IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN C.PACK_QRNO IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN ABS(ISNULL(S.Cell수량,0) - ISNULL(C.Cell수량,0)) > 0.01 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, COALESCE(S.대기작업시각, C.대기작업시각), COALESCE(S.PACK_QRNO, C.PACK_QRNO)

WITH SUBUL AS ( SELECT 구분, 도우모델, SUM(ISNULL(BOH_MONTH, 0)) AS V_BOH, SUM(ISNULL(IN_MONTH, 0)) AS V_IN, SUM(ISNULL(NG_MONTH, 0)) AS V_NG, SUM(ISNULL(OUT_MONTH, 0)) AS V_OUT, SUM(ISNULL(EOH_MONTH, 0)) AS V_EOH, SUM(ISNULL(LOSS_MONTH, 0)) AS V_LOSS FROM V_DOI_PROD_SUBUL WHERE YYYYMM = #{yyyymm} GROUP BY 구분, 도우모델 ), CALC_IN AS ( SELECT LEFT(LOT_NO, 4) AS 도우모델, SUM(ISNULL(CELL수량, 0)) AS R_IN FROM d21_제조지시VLR WHERE 공정코드 = '010' AND 작업시작 BETWEEN #{yyyymm} + '01' AND REPLACE(EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},1,4), SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},5,2), 1)),'-','') GROUP BY LEFT(LOT_NO, 4) ), CALC_NG_FRONT AS ( SELECT LEFT(LOT_NO, 4) AS 도우모델, SUM(ISNULL(불량수량, 0)) AS R_NG_FRONT FROM d21_제조지시VLR WHERE 작업시작 BETWEEN #{yyyymm} + '01' AND REPLACE(EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},1,4), SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},5,2), 1)),'-','') AND ISNULL(불량수량, 0) > 0 GROUP BY LEFT(LOT_NO, 4) ), CALC_NG_BACK AS ( SELECT LEFT(RUN_NO, 4) AS 도우모델, SUM(ISNULL(불량수량, 0)) AS R_NG_BACK FROM d22_RUN제조VLR WHERE 작업시작 BETWEEN #{yyyymm} + '01' AND REPLACE(EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},1,4), SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},5,2), 1)),'-','') AND ISNULL(불량수량, 0) > 0 GROUP BY LEFT(RUN_NO, 4) ), CALC_OUT AS ( SELECT LEFT(RUN_ID, 4) AS 도우모델, SUM(ISNULL(Cell수량, 0)) AS R_OUT FROM d27_내포장MST WHERE 대기작업시각 BETWEEN #{yyyymm} + '01 080000' AND FORMAT(DATEADD(MONTH, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},1,4), SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},5,2), 1)), 'yyyyMMdd') + ' 075959' GROUP BY LEFT(RUN_ID, 4) ) SELECT COALESCE(S.구분, '미분류') AS 구분, COALESCE(S.도우모델, I.도우모델, NF.도우모델, NB.도우모델, O.도우모델) AS 도우모델, -- 뷰 값 ISNULL(S.V_BOH, 0) AS V_BOH, ISNULL(S.V_IN, 0) AS V_IN, ISNULL(S.V_NG, 0) AS V_NG, ISNULL(S.V_OUT, 0) AS V_OUT, ISNULL(S.V_EOH, 0) AS V_EOH, ISNULL(S.V_LOSS, 0) AS V_LOSS, -- 역산 값 ISNULL(I.R_IN, 0) AS R_IN, ISNULL(NF.R_NG_FRONT, 0) + ISNULL(NB.R_NG_BACK, 0) AS R_NG, ISNULL(O.R_OUT, 0) AS R_OUT, -- 검산: BOH + IN - NG - OUT - LOSS ISNULL(S.V_BOH,0) + ISNULL(I.R_IN,0) - (ISNULL(NF.R_NG_FRONT,0) + ISNULL(NB.R_NG_BACK,0)) - ISNULL(O.R_OUT,0) - ISNULL(S.V_LOSS,0) AS R_EOH, -- 차이 ISNULL(S.V_IN, 0) - ISNULL(I.R_IN, 0) AS DIFF_IN, ISNULL(S.V_OUT, 0) - ISNULL(O.R_OUT, 0) AS DIFF_OUT, ISNULL(S.V_EOH, 0) - ( ISNULL(S.V_BOH,0) + ISNULL(I.R_IN,0) - (ISNULL(NF.R_NG_FRONT,0) + ISNULL(NB.R_NG_BACK,0)) - ISNULL(O.R_OUT,0) - ISNULL(S.V_LOSS,0) ) AS DIFF_EOH, -- 상태 CASE WHEN ABS(ISNULL(S.V_IN,0) - ISNULL(I.R_IN,0)) > 0.01 OR ABS(ISNULL(S.V_OUT,0) - ISNULL(O.R_OUT,0)) > 0.01 THEN '불일치' ELSE '일치' END AS STATUS FROM SUBUL S LEFT JOIN CALC_IN I ON S.도우모델 = I.도우모델 LEFT JOIN CALC_NG_FRONT NF ON S.도우모델 = NF.도우모델 LEFT JOIN CALC_NG_BACK NB ON S.도우모델 = NB.도우모델 LEFT JOIN CALC_OUT O ON S.도우모델 = O.도우모델 ORDER BY S.구분, S.도우모델

SELECT LOT_NO, 공정코드, 순서, RUN_NO, 작업구분, 작업시작, CELL수량, 양품수량 FROM d21_제조지시VLR WHERE 공정코드 = '010' AND 작업시작 BETWEEN #{yyyymm} + '01' AND REPLACE(EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},1,4), SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},5,2), 1)),'-','') AND LEFT(LOT_NO, 4) = #{model} ORDER BY 작업시작, LOT_NO

SELECT PACK_QRNO, RUN_ID, 발행일자, 상태코드, PACK상태, Cell수량, Tray수량, 대기작업시각 FROM d27_내포장MST WHERE 대기작업시각 BETWEEN #{yyyymm} + '01 080000' AND FORMAT(DATEADD(MONTH, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},1,4), SUBSTRING(#{yyyymm},5,2), 1)), 'yyyyMMdd') + ' 075959' AND LEFT(RUN_ID, 4) = #{model} ORDER BY 대기작업시각, PACK_QRNO

SELECT HIST_SEQ, CHANGE_DT, CHANGE_TYPE, CHANGE_USER, CHANGE_REASON, PACK_QRNO, RUN_ID, 발행일자, 상태코드, PACK상태, Cell수량, Tray수량, 대기작업시각 FROM d27_내포장MST_HISTORY WHERE YYYYMM = #{yyyymm} AND PACK_QRNO = #{packQrno} ORDER BY CHANGE_DT DESC
